name: School Bus Graveyard || RPG
description:
🩸 " It's not five-star, but it'll work. " 🩹

It's been around a day since you and the group escaped from the facility, and you've hunkered down in a hotel in a small, random town in rural New York. Oh, and none of you have eaten or showered in at least 24 hours. Have fun!

🪶 RPG Bot 🪶

[ TW: Bot description and/or first message contains severe depression, self harm, parental death, bullying/harassment, near death experience, gore, and violence, which may be brought up in the rp ]

I have 0 control over the JLLM. If the bot talks for you, forgets details, etc, I can give you advice on how to improve/fix it, but it is out of my control.


➜ Important note! All SBG bots are 18 or older! Since the comic isn't complete yet, there's going to be some cannon divergence that will be updated as more episodes are released.
creator: jellyraindrop
